name: Struts: Validator Turned Off
description: A Struts action mapping explicitly disables validation by setting validate='false', causing all form input for that action to bypass the Struts Validator framework entirely.
detection_pattern: META[struts_action_config] sets validate=false on an action mapping, disabling CONTROL[struts_validator] so INGRESS[form_data] flows directly to the action's TRANSFORM or STORAGE operations without any framework validation
